title: Certificate of competency and commission and valid identification card required
doc_html:
§48.  Certificate of competency and commission and valid identification card required

No person shall perform or attempt to perform the work or duties of a boiler inspector unless he possesses a certificate of competency and commission and a valid identification card signifying such possession.

Amended by Acts 1974, No. 298, §1.
doc_text:
§48.  Certificate of competency and commission and valid identification card required
No person shall perform or attempt to perform the work or duties of a boiler inspector unless he possesses a certificate of competency and commission and a valid identification card signifying such possession.
Amended by Acts 1974, No. 298, §1.
